task.title: Enforce file-structure and package reachability audits
task.summary: Add deterministic checks for dogfood/source taxonomy, stale architecture references, misplaced scripts/tests, package reachability, generated-vs-canonical parity, and lock/audit readiness.

goal.outcome: The class of file-structure drift recently found manually is caught by automated architecture/audit checks.
acceptance: Checks fail on forbidden source folders, stale CodeWiki path references, misplaced product logic under scripts, and generated/canonical task-view mismatch.
Package audit fails when shipped source is unreachable/stale, lockfile is missing, or package dry-run includes/omits unexpected artifacts.
Tests or fixtures intentionally introduce drift and confirm checks fail.
non_goals: Do not refactor large UI files unless required for checks.

loop_start.reason: Compiler loops start from source refs and build handoffs, not prior loop chat memory.
evidence: new session id or recorded context reset

validation.reason: Implementation validation must not reuse builder thought context.

next_loop.reason: The next gateway must independently validate implementation evidence.

requirements.text: Remove canonical task phase state; task work state is status only.
Add deterministic guard against phase reintroduction in domain types, Pi schemas, and generated views.

evidence_mapping.criterion: No canonical phase types, schema, or generated phase keys.
evidence_mapping.evidence: `npm run check:architecture` passes with guards for `TASK_PHASE_VALUES`, `TaskPhase`, Pi phase schema, `.codewiki/index_graph.json`, and task context phase keys.

evidence_mapping.criterion: State and UI use status only.
evidence_mapping.evidence: `npm run test:smoke` passes with assertions for no `loop.phase` and resume status `in_progress`.

summary: TASK-081 removes task phases entirely and guards generated views against phase fields.

source: user decision: no task phases; just task status plus compiler/gateway builds

evidence: Smoke tests assert generated roadmap state no longer exposes `loop.phase`.
Architecture check asserts source/schema/generated task views do not expose phases.
tester.boundary: derive tests or test-design evidence before code changes where practical

evidence: Canonical domain types contain roadmap status values only.
Pi task patch schema no longer exposes `phase`.
State builders emit resume `status` and loop evidence without phase.
UI/control-room render status and gates, not phases.
Architecture check guards generated graph and task contexts against phase keys.
notes: This supersedes both earlier TASK-081 phase-cleanup builds. Task-close remains blocked until a per-task commit and task-close validation provide immutable proof.
builder.boundary: change code until tests, roadmap acceptance, and required checks pass

test_design_evidence: Smoke tests assert generated roadmap state no longer exposes `loop.phase`.
Architecture check asserts source/schema/generated task views do not expose phases.
code_change_evidence: Canonical domain types contain roadmap status values only.
Pi task patch schema no longer exposes `phase`.
State builders emit resume `status` and loop evidence without phase.
UI/control-room render status and gates, not phases.
Architecture check guards generated graph and task contexts against phase keys.

acceptance_mapping.criterion: Tasks use status only; task phases are not canonical.
acceptance_mapping.evidence: Removed `TASK_PHASE_VALUES`, `TaskPhase`, patch `phase`, resume `phase`, loop `phase`, and API/UI phase output from source. `scripts/check-architecture.mjs` fails if phase types or phase schema return.

acceptance_mapping.criterion: Generated views cannot silently preserve task phase drift.
acceptance_mapping.evidence: `scripts/check-architecture.mjs` scans `.codewiki/index_graph.json` and `.codewiki/roadmap/tasks/*/context.json` for `"phase":` keys and fails on recurrence.

acceptance_mapping.criterion: Build/validation gates own readiness instead of roadmap phase.
acceptance_mapping.evidence: Roadmap docs state validation readiness belongs to validation gateway/build/commit-proof evidence, not roadmap state; `codewiki_task` evidence updates status/evidence only.

acceptance_mapping.criterion: Regression checks prove no source/task API phase usage.
acceptance_mapping.evidence: `npm test` passes; smoke test asserts roadmap loop has no `phase` and status resume uses `in_progress`.

closure_brief.user_intent: Remove task phases because compiler builds and validation gates already represent lifecycle readiness.
implemented_changes: Removed task phase types, schemas, patch input, state output, resume output, and UI labels from source.
Converted roadmap loop evidence to status/evidence updates only.
Updated docs and README to describe task status plus gates, not phases.
Added architecture checks that fail if task phase types/schema/generated views return.
non_goals_preserved: Did not close tasks without immutable commit proof.
Did not rewrite historical builds/validation reports.
remaining_risks: Fresh implementation validation and commit slicing still required.

risks: Historical builds/validation/events still mention phase because they are immutable prior evidence.
Long-lived sessions loaded before this change may need reload before their in-memory CodeWiki tools stop emitting stale phase fields.

restore.note: Restored history is reference material until promoted into active knowledge or roadmap truth.

handoff.fallback: Use codewiki_state refresh=true and this implementation_build; do not rely on chat transcript memory.

commit.title: TASK-081 remove task phases from roadmap workflow
commit.body:
Remove task phases from canonical roadmap workflow. Tasks now use status only; compiler builds, validation reports, and commit proofs represent readiness and closure gates.

Checks: npm run typecheck; npm run check:architecture; npm run test:smoke; npm run test:features; npm run test:pack; npm test
Validation: replace <pending-validation> with implementation validation report ref before commit.
